title: 得意黑字体包&smileysans
description:
在MC中使用《得意黑》字体
Use the Proud Black font in MC
body:
[简体中文]

得意黑是一款在人文观感和几何特征中寻找平衡的中文黑体。整体字身窄而斜，细节融入了取法手绘美术字的特殊造型。字体支持简体中文常用字（覆盖 GB/T 2312-1980 编码字符集）、拉丁字母、西里尔字母、希腊字母、日文假名、阿拉伯数字和各类标点符号

## 字符支持

| 文字 | 支持情况 |
|:-:|:-:|
| 汉字       | 字体覆盖 [GB/T 2312-1980](https://openstd.samr.gov.cn/bzgk/gb/newGbInfo?hcno=5664A728BD9D523DE3B99BC37AC7A2CC) 编码字符集中的全部 6763 个汉字，并额外补充了 `啰`、`喰`、`瞭`、`𬌗` 4 个字，共计支持汉字 6767 个 |
| 拉丁字母   | 除基础拉丁字母外，覆盖欧洲、美洲、南亚各种语言所需的字符共 415 个，另加入必要的变体和本地化字形，可支持 100 余种语言，包括英语、法语、德语、西班牙语、芬兰语、越南语等 |
| 西里尔字母 | 支持基础西里尔字母共 80 个 |
| 希腊字母   | 支持基础希腊字母共 71 个 |
| 日文假名   | 支持平假名、片假名字符共 174 个 |
| 数字       | 支持阿拉伯数字、大小写罗马数字，以及其他 4 种样式的序数字 `㈠`、`②`、`⑶` 和 `⒋` |
| 标点符号   | 包含标点和其他各类符号共 200 余个 |

[English]

Proud Black is a Chinese black body that finds a balance between human perception and geometric features. The overall character body is narrow and oblique, and the details are integrated into the special shape of hand-drawn art characters. Fonts support Chinese Simplified common characters (covering GB/T 2312-1980 encoded character sets), Latin, Cyrillic, Greek, Japanese kana, Arabic numerals, and various punctuation marks

## Character support

| writing | Support situation |
|:-:|:-:|
| Chinese character       | Font override [GB/T 2312-1980](https://openstd.samr.gov.cn/bzgk/gb/newGbInfo?hcno=5664A728BD9D523DE3B99BC37AC7A2CC) All 6763 Chinese characters in the encoded character set，And added `啰`、`喰`、`瞭`、`𬌗` 4 additional characters, a total of 6767 Chinese characters are supported |
| Latin alphabet   | In addition to the basic Latin alphabet, a total of 415 characters are required to cover various languages in Europe, America, and South Asia, plus the necessary variants and localized glyphs, which can support more than 100 languages, including English, French, German, Spanish, Finnish, Vietnamese, etc |
| Cyrillic alphabet | A total of 80 basic Cyrillic alphabets are supported |
| Greek   | A total of 71 basic Greek letters are supported |
| Japanese kana   | Japanese kana supports 174 hiragana and katakana characters |
| digit       | Supports Arabic numerals, uppercase and lowercase Roman numerals, and 4 other styles of ordinal numerals `㈠`、`②`、`⑶` and `⒋` |
| punctuation mark   | There are more than 200 punctuation and other symbols |
